messages.reply: Routine update sent to Arihant Towers via WhatsApp: the next AMC visit is confirmed and the coordinator will share the ETA shortly.

messages.text: Escalator 3 has stopped with passengers stuck at the landing. This looks like an emergency.
messages.reply: Emergency received. The on-call team has been notified and a supervisor will contact the building immediately.

messages.text: Can you share the latest ticket update and expected technician arrival time for Tower B?
messages.reply: Routine update sent to Pearl Heights via Email: the active service status has been acknowledged and a progress note was shared instantly.

renewals.last_draft:
Subject: FUZI maintenance renewal for Pearl Heights

Your contract renews in 12 days. We can review uptime, parts coverage, and SLA options this week.

Subject: FUZI maintenance renewal for City Mall

Your contract renews in 38 days. We can review uptime, parts coverage, and SLA options this week.

Subject: FUZI maintenance renewal for Sunrise Hospital

Your contract renews in 58 days. We can review uptime, parts coverage, and SLA options this week.

work_orders.title: Pearl Heights Tower B
work_orders.body:
Deficiencies:
- [Urgent] After the visit, the technician reported that the landing door lock circuit is intermittent, the sill is out of line, and passengers could get delayed if the fault repeats
- [Urgent] Replace the D14 contact kit and roller set today
Parts needed: D14 contact kit, roller set
Permits needed: No permit is needed
work_orders.walkthrough_notes: After the visit, the technician reported that the landing door lock circuit is intermittent, the sill is out of line, and passengers could get delayed if the fault repeats. Replace the D14 contact kit and roller set today. No permit is needed.

deficiencies.summary: After the visit, the technician reported that the landing door lock circuit is intermittent, the sill is out of line, and passengers could get delayed if the fault repeats
Replace the D14 contact kit and roller set today

work_orders.title: City Mall Escalator 3
work_orders.body: Inspect drive cooling, clean comb plate sensors, and monitor E31 recurrence.
work_orders.walkthrough_notes: Tech voice note: comb plate sensors need cleaning, drive cooling fans are noisy, and the recurrence should be monitored this week. Order a fan assembly and sensor harness. Night-access permit from mall facilities is required before work starts.
